name: Reminders
description: Adds slash commands for scheduling reminders for yourself or another server member, with persistent storage and automatic delivery.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: Reminders loaded! Use `[p]remindme <when> <message>` or `[p]remind <member> <when> <message>`. Run `[p]slash sync` for `/remindme` and `/remind`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores reminder creator IDs, target user IDs, guild IDs, channel IDs, due timestamps, creation timestamps, and reminder text until reminders are delivered or deleted.
